title: Timer / Stopwatch MOD
description: Simple Timer / Stopwatch  mod You can change the keybinds in the keybinds menu! leave your ideas in the comments so i can maybe add them. You can change the scale the exact position and the color and enable / disable the mod via menu
body:
I got tired of timer mods that felt bloated, hard to customize, or bad for my frame rate. I built this mod to be a clean and lightweight way to track time. Whether you are doing a speedrun, timing a mini-game, or just keeping an eye on your session, this timer stays out of your way until you need it. It is designed to be unobtrusive and works perfectly with your existing HUD.

**Key Features**

* **Performance Focused:** This mod is built to be extremely lightweight. It will not cause background lag or impact your FPS, so you can keep your game running smoothly.
* **Pixel-Perfect Positioning:** You can move the timer anywhere on your screen. It uses exact coordinates so you can fit it perfectly between your other UI elements.
* **Custom Scaling:** If the timer is too big or too small, you can adjust the scale to whatever fits your monitor or resolution best.
* **Visual Customization:** You can change the text color to match your current texture pack or UI theme.
* **Quick Toggle:** You can turn the timer on or off with a single keybind. This is great for when you want a clean screen for screenshots or recording.

**Easy Configuration**

I hate messing with configuration files, so I made sure you never have to. Everything is handled inside the game. Just go to your keybind settings, set a key for the mod menu, and you can change your settings in real time. You will see your changes happen instantly while you play.

**Let’s Chat**

I am always working to improve this mod. If you find a bug or have an idea for a new feature, please reach out to me. Your feedback is what helps me make this better for everyone.

* You can leave a comment in the discord.
* Join the Discord server to report bugs, suggest features, or just hang out: [DISCORD](https://discord.gg/ZSUMnrB8WA)



**For Screen Shots** go look inside the gallery [GALLERY](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-timer-mod/gallery). And have a good day!.
